backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Jeevan HealthCare backend, defining data types (UserProfile, Booking, Service, etc.) and exposing shared functions for user management, bookings, services, Stripe payments, and access-controlled admin operations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (e.g., ConsultationTypePage route, fee calculation logic) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's React pages, components, and hooks.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes using OKLCH format.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Jeevan HealthCare React SPA, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router configuration with all application routes (public, admin, phlebotomist, doctor) including the `/consultation-type/$doctorId` route, wrapped with QueryClient and ThemeProvider.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminLayou: Admin section layout with a sidebar navigation menu that restricts access to authenticated users with admin or lab-executive capabilities, redirecting others to home.
frontend/src/components/doctor/DoctorLay: Provides the authenticated layout shell for the doctor portal, including a sidebar navigation menu and role-based access control that redirects or shows an error if the user lacks the doctor role.
frontend/src/components/DoctorCard.tsx: Reusable card component for displaying a doctor's avatar, rating, specialties, consultation modes, and a 'Book Now' button with hover animations following the Medical Blue theme.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand info, quick navigation links, service links, and contact details including phone, email, address, and social media icons.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky site header with a top emergency bar, logo, desktop/mobile navigation, cart badge, and user authentication controls including role-based dashboard routing.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps pages with Header, Footer, and a ProfileSetupModal that appears when an authenticated user has no profile.
frontend/src/components/phlebotomist/Phl: Provides the authenticated layout shell for the phlebotomist portal with a sidebar, redirecting unauthenticated or unauthorized users to the home page.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that collects name, email, and phone from a newly authenticated user and saves their profile with a default patient role.
frontend/src/components/SpecialtyAccordi: Accordion UI listing 16 medical specialty categories, each expandable to show individual specialists that can be selected via a callback or navigation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCart.ts: Zustand store with localStorage persistence managing a shopping cart of lab tests/packages, exposing add, remove, update, clear, and price calculation methods.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login, logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend data fetching and mutations, covering services, user profiles, role checks, bookings, doctor data, and more.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base/components/utilities, Jeevan brand CSS custom properties (OKLCH colors) for light and dark modes, and typography utilities.
frontend/src/lib/mockDoctors.ts: Defines the MockDoctor interface and exports a MOCK_DOCTORS array with sample doctor data (id, name, specialty, fees, availability, etc.) shared across doctor-related pages.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static About page displaying Jeevan HealthCare's mission, vision, story, and core values using cards and icons.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminCRMPage.ts: Admin CRM page for managing sales leads with a table view, status filtering, search, and a dialog for adding/editing leads including assignee, service interest, and follow-up comments.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminCustomersP: Admin page for managing customers with search, add, update, and deactivate functionality displayed in a table with a details dialog showing associated patients.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminDashboardP: Admin dashboard page that fetches and displays key operational metrics (orders, users, phlebotomists, reports) as stat cards.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminOrdersPage: Admin page that lists all customer bookings/orders fetched from the backend, showing address, description, preferred date, and budget per order.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminPatientsPa: Admin page for managing patients with search, add, update, and delete operations, including a details dialog that shows associated vitals.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminReportsPag: Admin page for managing test reports using hardcoded mock data, allowing viewing and verifying pending reports with upload functionality.
Admin page that fetches and displays all diagnostic services/packages as cards showing name, category, subcategory, and active status.
Admin page that lists all system users fetched from the backend, displaying each user's name, email, role (with icon), and active status as cards.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminVitalsPage: Admin page for managing patient vitals, supporting search/filter by status, and CRUD operations (add, update, delete) via mutation hooks with toast notifications.
frontend/src/pages/BookingPage.tsx: Multi-step booking form page that collects patient details, address, time slot, and payment method, then submits the booking and clears the cart.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Cart page that lists selected tests/packages with pricing, savings, and a checkout button, or shows an empty-cart state with a browse link.
Page for selecting a doctor consultation type (Online, Clinic, Home Visit) that calculates the final fee with corporate and subscription discounts, then navigates to the slot-booking step.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Displays a contact page with cards for phone, WhatsApp, email, address, and hours, plus social media links and an embedded Google Map.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorAnalytic: Doctor analytics page displaying performance metrics (completed consultations, rating, total patients, success rate) fetched from the dashboard stats hook with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorAppointm: Doctor appointments page with day/week/month view toggle, listing appointments with accept, cancel, and complete actions via the update appointment mutation hook.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorConsulta: Static doctor consultations page providing a teleconsultation interface (video/audio/chat) and a SOAP notes form with tabbed sections for structured clinical documentation.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorDashboar: Doctor dashboard page showing a personalized welcome and quick stats (today's appointments, pending prescriptions, earnings, rating) loaded from the dashboard stats hook with skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorEarnings: Displays a doctor's earnings dashboard with summary cards for total earnings, pending payments, and monthly earnings, plus a tabbed detail view; fetches data via the `useDoctorEarnings` hook.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorHelpPage: Static help and support page for doctors featuring quick-link cards for training materials, compliance, and support tickets, along with an FAQ accordion and a contact form.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorPatients: Renders a searchable list of a doctor's patients with details like blood group, relationship, and primary status; fetches patient data via the `useDoctorPatients` hook.
frontend/src/pages/doctor/DoctorProfileP: Static profile and settings page for doctors with tabbed sections for personal information, qualifications, availability, and notification/security settings.
frontend/src/pages/DoctorConsultationPag: Main doctor consultation listing page with search, sort options, specialty accordion, and a grid of DoctorCards filtered from mock data.
frontend/src/pages/DoctorListingPage.tsx: Specialty-filtered doctor listing page that reads a specialty URL param, applies search and sort, and renders DoctorCards with navigation back to the consultation page.
frontend/src/pages/HealthPage.tsx: Interactive health tools page featuring a symptom checker (with severity analysis) and a vitals tracker, organized in tabs with progress indicators.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page showing quick-service shortcuts, a 'Why Choose Us' section, and dynamically loaded health packages fetched via a React Query hook.
frontend/src/pages/OrdersPage.tsx: Displays a user's lab test orders with mock data, filterable by status tabs (All, Active, Completed), showing order details, status badges, and navigation to individual order views.
frontend/src/pages/OrderTrackingPage.tsx: Displays a static order tracking timeline for a given order ID, showing completed and pending steps with icons and timestamps.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/Phleboto: Lists a phlebotomist's assigned sample collections for the day with status badges, scheduled times, test names, and a Google Maps navigation button; fetches data via `useSampleCollections`.
Shows a phlebotomist's daily overview with metric cards for total, completed, in-progress, and pending sample collections derived from the `useSampleCollections` hook.
frontend/src/pages/PublicDoctorProfilePa: Renders a public-facing doctor profile page fetched by ID from mock data, displaying ratings, consultation modes, availability, qualifications, and a booking call-to-action.
frontend/src/pages/ReportsPage.tsx: Shows a list of verified lab test reports from mock data, with test badges and a Download PDF button for each report.
frontend/src/pages/ServicePage.tsx: Renders a detail page for a specific healthcare service (e.g., lab tests, doctor consultation) using a static data map keyed by route param, showing description, included services, target audience, and benefits.
frontend/src/pages/TestsPage.tsx: Provides a searchable, filterable catalog of diagnostic lab tests with cart integration, prescription upload, and profile setup modal, supporting add-to-cart and booking flows.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color tokens (using oklch CSS variables), typography, border radius, box shadows, font families, and accordion animations, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot (version 23) describing the Jeevan HealthCare app's full architecture, existing features, known issues, and module inventory for a React/Node.js home healthcare platform with role-based dashboards and AI-powered features.
